evidence_paragraphs.snippet: Still on board the *[Selaesori Qhoran](wiki:Selaesori_Qhoran)*, [Tyrion](wiki:Tyrion_Lannister) jousts on [Penny](wiki:Penny)'s 'Pretty Pig', for the amusement of the crew in hopes of sweetening...
Still on board the *[Selaesori Qhoran](wiki:Selaesori_Qhoran)*, [Tyrion](wiki:Tyrion_Lannister) jousts on [Penny](wiki:Penny)'s 'Pretty Pig', for the amusement of the crew in hopes of sweetening...
Still on board the *[Selaesori Qhoran](wiki:Selaesori_Qhoran)*, [Tyrion](wiki:Tyrion_Lannister) jousts on [Penny](wiki:Penny)'s 'Pretty Pig', for the amusement of the crew in hopes of sweetening...
Tyrion and Penny are talking when the ship suddenly starts to move. Everyone cheers until they notice the storm front looming on the horizon. [Moqorro](wiki:Moqorro) states that this is the storm...
